top_signals.title: Temporary inflation slowdown set to boost Burnham
top_signals.summary: Inflation is expected to have eased last month in a welcome but temporary boost for Andy Burnham’s incoming government.  The headline rate of Consumer Prices Index (CPI) inflation is tipped to have eased from 2.8 per cent in May to 2.6 per cent in June, according to some economists.  The latest rate of inflation will [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Asia AI bets power record equities run for Wall Street banks
top_signals.summary: Investments in semiconductors fuel growth in regional revenues for US banks
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Superdrug owner considers delay to planned London IPO
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong-based AS Watson was aiming for a dual listing this autumn
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The London IPO market isn’t as bad as it looks
top_signals.summary: It is easy to look enviously at New York, but the UK is on course to enjoy its best year for new listings since 2021
